nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: Edit these values before activating. Everything downstream references them via $('Config').

nodes.name: Refresh Strava token
nodes.notes: Strava returns a NEW refresh_token here. If it differs from Config.stravaRefreshToken you must update Config with the new value (see README - rotate refresh token).

nodes.name: Get activities
nodes.notes: Returns an array of activity summaries. after = unix seconds. per_page 50 is plenty for a 3h window.

nodes.name: Split activities
nodes.notes: The HTTP node wraps the array; split each activity into its own item. If your n8n returns the array directly, set 'Field to Split Out' accordingly (see README).

nodes.name: Check existing by stravaId
nodes.notes: runQuery returns an array; a match yields an item with a 'document' key, a miss yields an item with only a 'readTime' key. Uses the Google API (service account) credential.

nodes.name: Skip if exists
nodes.notes: Passes only activities that did NOT match an existing sessions doc (no 'document' key => new run).

nodes.name: Create session doc
nodes.notes: POST with an auto-generated document id. Uses the Google API (service account) credential.

nodes.name: Advance last synced
nodes.notes: Runs once at the end. Persists lastSyncedEpoch in workflow static data.
